calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming That Certain Asset Is Trust Property And Confirming Powers Of Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar Dec-10-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Phyllis Gold Berenson for Maria del Carmen Barrios.

The Court stated that before it was a petition to confirm trust assets, that it had read Hegstaad again, stated its concern with regard to a non-lawyer individual preparing trust documents, and noted that the deed is clear and convincing evidence. Ms. Bereson stated that they are just confirming the powers of the Successor Trustee with regard to the power to transfer the Trust. The Court granted the petition subject to review of the order and noted that the Kooker v. Kooker reference would be deleted.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Deputy Benton.

Petition For Order Confirming That Certain Asset Is Trust Property And Confirming Powers Of Successor Trustee.
